headline: deepika padukone's comeback blockbuster, ranveer singh's action thriller & alia bhatt's next big role! 🎬✨
hook_text: bollywood is on fire with massive comebacks and thrilling new projects! from deepika padukone's highly anticipated return to ranveer singh's explosive action film and alia bhatt's mysterious new character — here are the hottest bollywood stories trending today! 🔥

scenes.headline: deepika padukone returns with a blockbuster thriller! 🎥
scenes.details: deepika padukone is making her grand comeback in 2026 with a high-octane thriller that has already broken box office records in advance bookings. fans are calling it her most intense role yet.
scenes.hook_text: is this deepika's biggest comeback ever?

scenes.headline: ranveer singh's new action film sets the screen on fire! 💥
scenes.details: ranveer singh's upcoming action-packed film has released its first trailer, featuring jaw-dropping stunts and explosive sequences. the film is expected to redefine action cinema in india.
scenes.hook_text: can ranveer's action film become the next big blockbuster?

scenes.headline: alia bhatt's mysterious new role has fans guessing! 🤔
scenes.details: alia bhatt has signed on for a psychological thriller where she plays a complex character with multiple layers. early buzz suggests this could be her most challenging role to date.
scenes.hook_text: what secrets does alia's new character hold?
